# YOUR CODE HERE
import sys
from itertools import combinations_with_replacement

def generate_repunits(max_digits):
    repunits = []
    num = 0
    for _ in range(max_digits):
        num = num * 10 + 1
        repunits.append(num)
    return repunits

def main():
    N = int(sys.stdin.readline())
    max_digits = 20  # Sufficient for N up to 333
    repunits = generate_repunits(max_digits)
    
    sums_set = set()
    for combo in combinations_with_replacement(repunits, 3):
        total = sum(combo)
        sums_set.add(total)
    
    sorted_sums = sorted(sums_set)
    print(sorted_sums[N - 1])

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
